summary: Our approach scales the FFN hidden dimension massively while enforcing extreme sparsity—baking monosemanticity directly into the model.
A dynamic memory architecture that mixes full-fidelity tokens with compressed gist embeddings to achieve massive context at sub-quadratic cost.
A weight-conditioned hypernetwork that reads out a network's redundancy directly from its weights — no data, no gradients — pruning 60–85% of neurons while strictly dominating classical heuristics.

A routed architecture where experts read the full residual stream but write to disjoint slices — removing cross-expert interference by construction and producing natively interpretable representations that rival post-hoc SAEs.
